name: rad-typescript
description: RAD TypeScript — production-grade TypeScript standards for strict-mode architecture, type safety, API boundary defense, error handling, and AI codegen guardrails. Built from 34 curated sources including official TypeScript 4.9–5.7 docs, TSConfig reference, Zod documentation, neverthrow/errore error handling libraries, Fastify type providers, and community best practices. Enforces zero-any policy, parse-don't-validate at boundaries, discriminated unions, and Result-type error handling.
